title: 大阪杯の後に・ライバルの帰国

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
All right, who was the fool that said the race
would be too short for her, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
No kidding... Kitasan Black doesn't mess around...
She blew it out of the water this time too...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Huff... huff... I don't have anything I'm particularly good at, nor can I steal the show in any way. But despite that...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not bad at anything, either! I've conquered
my weaknesses! Whether they're 2,000 or 3,000
meters long, I'll run 'em all!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I did it, Dia. I've completed my first goal of the
year!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let this be enough to reach the very end!
choice_data_list: Well done, Kitasan! Now on to the next.
Well done, Kitasan! Now on to the next.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! There's nothing I can't do, and
no path I can't run through to the end!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I won this race, and I'll win the next one too! An
uphill battle over 3,000 meters long for that
brilliant plaque!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Bring on the spring Tenno Sho! I'm out to prove
that anyone can make it big if they work hard
enough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I dunno how to explain it, but... watching Kitasan
Black run makes me feel inspired for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She makes me feel like even average Joes
like us could make it big if we put our noses to
the grindstone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Elsewhere, a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're back. It's good to see you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You seem to have fully recovered from your
surgery. You've made your domestic comeback
and were even able to shine in the UAE G1 world.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Do you feel ready for the task ahead?

text_block_list.name: Brusquement
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A great deal has transpired while you were
running internationally.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Which race would you like to run in next? We
cannot make a final decision without your
trainer's input, of course...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But why don't we go pick flowers?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To make up for the chrysanthemum we forgot to
pluck last year at a certain Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many things are being put into motion ahead of
our next goal, the spring Tenno Sho.
